list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT device_id AS __text FROM public.devices WHERE enabled = true ORDER BY device_id ASC LIMIT 200;
list.label: Machine

list.name: interface
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT iface_name AS __text FROM public.net_metrics LIMIT 100;
list.label: Interface

options.content:
APEX COMMANDNOC OVERVIEW  |  ENG DRILL-DOWN  |  CAPACITY FORECAST  |  DIAGNOSTICS

APEX COMMAND

panels.description: OS Taskbar navigation and CSS theme.

panels.title: CPU Load

targets.rawSql: SELECT cpu_load_percent AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current CPU utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >80%, Red >90%.

panels.title: RAM Usage

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current RAM utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >85%, Red >95%.

panels.title: Storage Saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current disk utilization (%) for the selected machine. Yellow >70%, Red >90%.

panels.title: Temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT temp_c AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 minutes' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND temp_c > 0 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Current temperature (°C) for the selected machine. Yellow >70°C, Red >85°C.

panels.title: Memory Saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, ROUND((avg_ram_used / NULLIF(avg_ram_total, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 1) AS "RAM %" FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) ORDER BY 1

panels.description: RAM utilization for the selected machine. Yellow at 75%, Red at 90%. Gapfilled via LOCF.

panels.title: Network Bandwidth (Per-Interface)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, device_id, iface_name,
  rx_mbps AS "Download (Mbps)",
  tx_mbps AS "Upload (Mbps)"
FROM public.net_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND iface_name IN (${interface:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, device_id, iface_name,
  rx_mbps AS "Download (Mbps)",
  tx_mbps AS "Upload (Mbps)"
FROM public.net_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND iface_name IN (${interface:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Per-interface bandwidth from interface_metrics JSONB. Download positive, Upload mirrored via negative-Y axis.

panels.title: Temperature Sensors

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, max_temp AS "Temperature (°C)" FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, max_temp, AVG(max_temp) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(STDDEV(max_temp) OVER w, 0) AS sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, CASE WHEN sigma > 0 THEN ROUND(((max_temp - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Temperature readings from sensor OIDs (UCD-SNMP lmSensors) for the selected machine.

panels.title: LDI Throughput & Process Efficiency

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, throughput AS "Throughput" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND throughput > 0 ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, pressure AS "PE" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND pressure IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.description: LDI manufacturing throughput (left axis, green) and Process Efficiency in µm (right axis, yellow). PE within ±10µm tolerance is normal.

panels.title: LDI Junction Efficiency & Humidity

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, joule_effect AS "JE" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND joule_effect IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, humidity AS "Humidity" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND humidity > 0 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Junction Efficiency in µm (purple) and Humidity % (blue, right axis). High humidity may affect LDI precision.

panels.title: LDI Quality Scatter

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, pressure AS "PE" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND pressure IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
SELECT time, joule_effect AS "JE" FROM public.ldi_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND joule_effect IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

panels.description: LDI quality scatter with ±10µm tolerance zone (green band). Points outside the zone indicate quality risk.

panels.title: CPU Anomaly Score (Z-Score)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, avg_cpu, AVG(avg_cpu) OVER w AS moving_avg, COALESCE(STDDEV(avg_cpu) OVER w, 0) AS moving_stddev FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, CASE WHEN moving_stddev > 0 THEN ROUND(((avg_cpu - moving_avg) / moving_stddev)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: CPU Z-Score per machine. Cyan = normal, Amber >= 2 sigma, Red >= 3 sigma.

panels.title: Temperature Anomaly Score (Z-Score)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT bucket, device_id, max_temp, AVG(max_temp) OVER w AS mu, COALESCE(NULLIF(STDDEV(max_temp) OVER w, 0), 1) AS sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN 60 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) SELECT bucket AS time, device_id, ROUND(((max_temp - mu) / sigma)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM stats ORDER BY 1

panels.description: Temperature Z-Score per machine. Cyan = normal, Amber >= 2 sigma, Red >= 3 sigma.

panels.title: CPU / RAM / Storage Distribution

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'CPU Load %' AS metric, AVG(cpu_load_percent) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT 'RAM Used %' AS metric, AVG(ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT 'Disk Used %' AS metric, AVG(disk_used_gb / NULLIF(disk_total_gb, 0) * 100) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

panels.description: CPU/RAM/Storage usage distribution across selected machines

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Healthy' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND cpu_load_percent < 80 AND ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 < 85

SELECT 'Warning' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND (cpu_load_percent BETWEEN 80 AND 90 OR ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 BETWEEN 85 AND 95)
SELECT 'Critical' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.sys_metrics WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND (cpu_load_percent > 90 OR ram_used_mb / NULLIF(ram_total_mb, 0) * 100 > 95)
